findings.finding: Good test coverage: all required TDD tests from task spec are present (balance parsing, CoinGecko parsing, gas estimation native/token, offline mode, fiat calculation)
No test for signTransaction with invalid/malformed private key (e.g. empty string, too short)
findings.suggestion: Add test: signTransaction with empty string returns null
findings.rationale: Edge case coverage for error handling

findings.finding: Mock setup for Web3j is clean and well-structured. Each test is self-contained with clear setup/assertion pattern.
No test for fetchFiatPrices (uses CoinGeckoApi mock)
findings.suggestion: Consider adding test for fetchFiatPrices with mocked CoinGeckoApi to complete coverage
findings.rationale: The parseCoinGeckoPrices is well-tested, but the suspend wrapper deserves a test too

summary: 35 tests all passing. Comprehensive coverage of the required TDD scenarios. Tests follow established CryptoManagerTest patterns. Minor suggestions for edge case coverage.
